discussion_comments.comment_body:
Is it valid that parent-child can be same-ranked?

Maybe same validation check as in relationships?
https://github.com/likec4/likec4/blob/89cadcd084b7d5e5572dc335c0e1c14ef59ae217/packages/language-server/src/validation/relation.ts#L44-L48

Simplify this positive test case for rank same case of the same siblings. 
I have decided not support same-ranked for parent-child. Such case has been rejected in 
view-checks.ts:33-42
